title: Open Monitors Category
goal: Open the Monitors category from the Demoblaze storefront and stop on the filtered listing.
instruction: On the Demoblaze storefront, open the Monitors category and stop when the filtered monitor listing is visible.
review_notes: Second Demoblaze category task. It expands the retail slice beyond laptops while staying deterministic.

steps.explanation: I waited briefly for the storefront product grid to finish loading.
I opened the Monitors category to filter the storefront listing.

action.summary: I opened the Monitors category and stopped when the filtered listing was visible.

steps.explanation: The monitor-only product list is visible now, so I am ending the task.
